---
title: Data Visualisation
description: "Publication-quality graphics in R with ggplot2, from the grammar of graphics through colour, annotation, layout, and interactivity"
---

A good figure answers a question at a glance; a bad one hides the answer behind decoration. This area teaches the grammar of graphics as implemented in `ggplot2`, and builds out from there to every common plot type, colour palette choice, annotation technique, and multi-panel composition used in life-science publications.

Every tutorial uses the same dataset-to-figure workflow: read the data, wrangle it into the tidy shape a plotting call expects, choose geoms and aesthetics deliberately, tune scales and themes for legibility, and export at a resolution suitable for submission.

## Topics covered

- The grammar of graphics: data, mappings, geoms, stats, scales, coordinates, facets, themes
- Univariate plots: histograms, density plots, ECDFs, boxplots, violin plots, dotplots, raincloud plots
- Bivariate plots: scatter plots with regression lines, 2D density, hexbin, contour
- Categorical plots: bar charts, stacked and dodged bars, Cleveland dot plots, heatmaps
- Time-series plots: line plots, ribbon bands for uncertainty, calendar heatmaps
- Statistical plots: forest plots, funnel plots, Bland-Altman plots, ROC curves, survival curves
- Multi-panel layouts: `facet_wrap`, `facet_grid`, and the `patchwork` package for arbitrary compositions
- Colour theory: perceptually uniform palettes (`viridis`), colour-blind-safe choices, diverging scales
- Typography, annotation, labelling, and manuscript-ready export (`ggsave`, size and DPI conventions)
- Interactive graphics with `plotly`, `ggiraph`, and `htmlwidgets` for HTML reports

The emphasis throughout is on figures that stand alone: legible axes, informative legends, captions that tell the reader what to see.

<!-- card-grid-injected -->

## Tutorials

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Aesthetics and Geoms](aesthetics-and-geoms.qmd)
The two ggplot2 building blocks: what data to map (aesthetics) and how to draw it (geoms)
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Annotations and Labels](annotations-and-labels.qmd)
Adding text, arrows, rectangles, and repelling labels to ggplot2 figures
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bar Charts](bar-charts.qmd)
Counts per category and summarised values per category
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bland-Altman Plots](bland-altman-plots.qmd)
Mean-vs-difference plot for comparing two measurement methods
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Boxplots](boxplots.qmd)
Five-number summary display: Tukey boxplots with whiskers and outlier rules
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bubble Plots](bubble-plots.qmd)
Scatter plots with a third variable encoded by point size
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Colour Palettes](colour-palettes.qmd)
Discrete, continuous, perceptually uniform, and diverging palettes for ggplot2
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Colour-Blind-Safe Plots](colour-blind-safe-plots.qmd)
Designing plots that remain readable to viewers with colour-vision deficiencies
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Contour Plots](contour-plots.qmd)
Isolines of a 2D scalar field or density
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Correlation Heatmaps](correlation-heatmaps.qmd)
Visualising a correlation matrix with colour-encoded cells and significance markers
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Density Plots](density-plots.qmd)
Smooth distribution display via kernel density estimation
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Dot Plots](dot-plots.qmd)
Cleveland dot plots and Wilkinson dot plots for compact distributional displays
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Facets and Panels](facets-and-panels.qmd)
Creating small multiples via facet_wrap and facet_grid
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Forest Plots (Visualisation)](forest-plots-viz.qmd)
Point estimates and confidence intervals stacked across studies or subgroups
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Funnel Plots (Visualisation)](funnel-plots-viz.qmd)
Study effect vs. precision plot used to detect publication bias in meta-analysis
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Heatmaps](heatmaps.qmd)
Matrix displays with colour-encoded cell values, optionally with row/column ordering
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Hexbin Plots](hexbin-plots.qmd)
Binning the 2D plane into hexagons and colouring by count, for large bivariate data
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Histograms](histograms.qmd)
Univariate distribution display via binned frequencies or densities
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Interactive Plots with ggiraph](interactive-ggiraph.qmd)
Interactive SVG-based ggplot extensions with per-element hover, click, and selection
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Interactive Plots with plotly](interactive-plotly.qmd)
Converting ggplot objects to interactive HTML plots via ggplotly()
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Line Plots](line-plots.qmd)
Connecting ordered observations with lines for time-series and trajectory displays
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Pairs Plots](pairs-plots.qmd)
Scatterplot matrices for exploring pairwise relationships among several continuous variables
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Patchwork: Multi-Plot Composition](patchwork-composition.qmd)
Composing multiple ggplot objects into a single figure with the patchwork package
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [ROC Curves](roc-curves-plot.qmd)
Sensitivity vs 1-specificity plots for diagnostic tests and binary classifiers
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Raincloud Plots](raincloud-plots.qmd)
Half-violin + jittered raw points + boxplot: a comprehensive distribution display
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Ridge Plots](ridge-plots.qmd)
Stacked density curves across groups, also called 'joy plots'
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Saving and Exporting Figures](ggsave-and-export.qmd)
Exporting ggplot figures to PDF, PNG, SVG, and TIFF with the right dimensions and DPI
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Scales and Coordinates](scales-and-coordinates.qmd)
Controlling how data values are mapped to visual values (scales) and how the plot area is organised (coordinates)
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Scatter Plots](scatter-plots.qmd)
The bivariate continuous default: geom_point with overplotting strategies and trend lines
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Stacked and Dodged Bars](stacked-dodged-bars.qmd)
Two-factor bar charts: stacking for composition, dodging for side-by-side comparison
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Survival Curves](survival-curves-plot.qmd)
Publication-quality Kaplan-Meier plots with risk tables and log-rank annotation
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [The Grammar of Graphics](grammar-of-graphics.qmd)
Understanding ggplot2 as a layered grammar: data, mappings, geoms, stats, scales, coordinates, facets, and themes
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Time Series Plots](time-series-plots.qmd)
Dated line plots with forecast bands and decomposition displays
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Violin Plots](violin-plots.qmd)
Symmetric kernel density plots for comparing distributions across groups
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [ggplot2 Themes](ggplot-themes.qmd)
Visual styling of plots via complete themes and fine-grained theme() elements
:::

:::
